title: Half Way to Heaven
writer: George Abbott, Henry Leyford Gates, Gerald Geraghty
actors: Charles 'Buddy' Rogers, Jean Arthur, Paul Lukas
plot: Nick, the "swing" man in a trapeze troupe, loves Greta Nelson, the girl in the act; and Tony, the "flyer," incurs his enmity as Greta seems to favor him; thus Nick fails to catch Tony, and Tony is killed. Ned Lee, a novice, report...
